mapper.select: select case when count(1) > 0 then true else false end from card_tag where tag_id = #{tagId}
select distinct c.* from card c join card_tag ct on c.id = ct.card_id join scene_tag st on ct.tag_id = st.tag_id where st.scene_id = #{sceneId} order by c.id
select distinct c.id from card c join card_tag ct on c.id = ct.card_id join scene_tag st on ct.tag_id = st.tag_id where st.scene_id = #{sceneId} order by c.id
select count(distinct c.id) from card c join card_tag ct on c.id = ct.card_id join scene_tag st on ct.tag_id = st.tag_id where st.scene_id = #{sceneId}
select case when count(1) > 0 then true else false end from card c join card_tag ct on c.id = ct.card_id join scene_tag st on ct.tag_id = st.tag_id where st.scene_id = #{sceneId} and c.id = #{cardId}

select ct.card_id as cardId, t.id as tagId, t.name, t.color from tag t join card_tag ct on t.id = ct.tag_id where ct.card_id in
#{id}
